events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: confined space work in progress, permit expired mid-shift. Under OSHA 1910.146, a confined space entry permit is valid only for the duration of the task and must be kept on site. If the permit expires, work must stop, the space must be evacuated, and a new permit must be issued before re-entry.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, dangerous).
Risk: critical.
Work stage: in-progress.
Component conditions: non-compliant.
Findings: permit expired mid-shift, work continuing without valid permit.
Actions: stop work, evacuate confined space, re-evaluate hazards, re-test atmosphere, issue new entry permit before re-entry.
References: OSHA 1910.146.
